summary: Iteration 266 — SKU base_uom + Packaging Master feature verified end-to-end. 5/5 backend pytest checks pass; UI add/save/reopen on /sku-management persists base_uom + packaging_config.master + per-flow arrays correctly with one ★ default per flow. PET SKU restored to pre-test state.
critical_code_review_comments: Migrated pack names use spaces around hyphen ('Crate - 12') instead of the spec-stated 'Crate-12'. Tests were normalized to accept either form, but the spec/PRD wording in the request should be aligned with the actual migrated values (or vice-versa).

POST /api/master-skus expects field `sku_name` (not `sku`). The GET response normalises to both keys (sku and sku_name) but write endpoints only accept `sku_name`. Consider accepting both on create/update for API symmetry, OR document this asymmetry.
SKUManagement.js modal works correctly but is part of a 700+ line file - consider splitting modal into a subcomponent (non-blocking).

On PUT, when the user sets ★ default on a non-Bottle pack for stock_out, the backend preserves the previous Bottle entry with is_default=false. Confirmed denormalized arrays remain intact so downstream DeliveriesTab still resolves packaging_units correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (sku-management feature); regression on /distributor-detail not exercised in this run

seed_data_creation: Test mutations: (a) Edited PET SKU (id ff23d238-07eb-4a5b-98c3-46e268a9e367) via UI to add Carton-48 to master + stock_out + promo_stock_out with ★ default, then RESTORED via API to Bottle=1 only on all flows. (b) pytest test_update_and_roundtrip mutated Nyla 600ml Silver with TEST_PACK_PYTEST_266 then restored original packaging_config. (c) pytest test_create_then_delete created and deleted a TEST_SKU_266_PYTEST. Catalog is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_266_sku_base_uom_packaging.py is idempotent and self-restoring. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set. Notes: (1) packaging master uses 'Crate - 12' format (spaces). (2) POST/PUT body uses sku_name, not sku. (3) The /distributor-detail/<id> page in headless Playwright produced blank screenshots in this run — could be a hydration or auth-token timing issue worth checking in a future iteration; this run skipped the live delivery-pkg-* dropdown click. Confirmed via API that Nyla – 330 ml / Silver has 'Crate - 24'=24 in packaging_config.stock_out, and iteration 265 already validated that DeliveriesTab.jsx renders these options under data-testid=delivery-pkg-<index>.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification only. End-to-end evidence: (1) GET /api/master-skus returns base_uom='Bottle' for all 8 active SKUs and packaging_config.master is populated everywhere. (2) Nyla – 600 ml / Silver master contains Crate-12=12, Crate-24=24, Carton-48=48, Carton-6=6 (with spaces in actual names). (3) PUT round-trip persists base_uom + master + all four per-flow arrays including is_default. (4) POST then DELETE works (CEO hard-delete). (5) UI: clicking edit-sku-<id> opens modal with sku-base-uom-input value='Bottle', packaging-master-section + pkg-matrix-table + pkg-master-add all present; pkg-master-add select offers packaging types catalog; chosen pack appears as new pkg-master-row-<idx>; pkg-flow-{stock_out,promo_stock_out}-<idx> checkboxes tick; pkg-default-* star toggles amber; clicking Update fires PUT and shows 'SKU updated successfully'; reopening the SKU shows the new row with both checkboxes still checked and both stars amber-active; the corresponding PUT payload returned by GET has Carton-48 as is_default=true in both stock_out and promo_stock_out arrays (Bottle demoted to is_default=false), production/stock_in left untouched as expected.
